shared.fallbackLink: Or paste this link into your browser:

verify-email.subject: Verify your email address
verify-email.preview: Confirm your email address to finish setting up your account.
verify-email.heading: Confirm your email
verify-email.body: {named, select, yes {Hi {name}, thanks for signing up. Please confirm your email address to finish setting up your account.} other {Hi there, thanks for signing up. Please confirm your email address to finish setting up your account.}}

password-reset.subject: Reset your password
password-reset.heading: Reset your password
password-reset.body: {named, select, yes {Hi {name}, we received a request to reset your password. Choose a new one using the link below.} other {Hi there, we received a request to reset your password. Choose a new one using the link below.}}
password-reset.note: This link expires in 1 hour and can be used once. If you didn't request a reset, you can safely ignore this email — your password will not change.

invitation.subject: You've been invited to join {orgName}
invitation.heading: Join {orgName}
invitation.note: This invitation expires in 7 days. If you weren't expecting it, you can ignore this email.

payment-failed.subject: Your payment didn't go through
payment-failed.preview: We couldn't process the payment for {orgName}.
payment-failed.heading: Your payment didn't go through
payment-failed.body: We couldn't process the {amount} payment for {orgName}. This usually means the card expired or was declined.
payment-failed.action: Update your payment method to keep your subscription active.
payment-failed.note: We'll retry automatically over the next few days. If the payment keeps failing, your subscription may be cancelled.

subscription-confirmed.subject: Your subscription is active
subscription-confirmed.preview: The {planName} plan is now active for {orgName}.
subscription-confirmed.heading: Your subscription is active
subscription-confirmed.body: The {planName} plan is now active for {orgName}. Thanks for subscribing.
subscription-confirmed.manage: You can manage your plan, payment method, and invoices any time.

client-otp.subject: {code} is your sign-in code
client-otp.heading: Sign in to {orgName}
client-otp.body: Enter this code in the tab where you started signing in to {orgName}.
client-otp.expiry: The code expires in {minutes} minutes and can be used once.
client-otp.note: If you did not request this code, you can ignore this message — nobody can sign in without it.

welcome.subject: Welcome aboard
welcome.heading: {named, select, yes {Welcome, {name}!} other {Welcome!}}
welcome.body: Your email is verified and your account is ready to use.
welcome.next: Start by creating an organization and inviting your team — that's where the shared workspace lives.

onboarding-tips.subject: Three things worth knowing
onboarding-tips.preview: A few things that make the product click.
onboarding-tips.heading: Getting the most out of it
onboarding-tips.body: {named, select, yes {Hi {name}, a few things that tend to click for people early on:} other {Hi there, a few things that tend to click for people early on:}}
onboarding-tips.inviteText: Most of the value shows up once more than one person is in the workspace.
onboarding-tips.rolesText: Owners manage billing, admins manage people, members do the work.
onboarding-tips.contextText: Your personal space and each organization keep their data completely separate.

onboarding-features.subject: Ready for more?
onboarding-features.preview: The features you haven't tried yet.
onboarding-features.heading: Ready for more?
onboarding-features.body: {named, select, yes {Hi {name}, you've been with us a week. Here's what a paid plan opens up:} other {Hi there, you've been with us a week. Here's what a paid plan opens up:}}
onboarding-features.limits: Higher limits on everything you're already using

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.passwordLetter: Password must include at least one letter.
validation.passwordNumber: Password must include at least one number.
validation.resetTokenInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters and include a letter and a number.
errors.accountSuspended: This account has been suspended. Contact support for help.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many sign-in attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.resetLinkExpired: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.

forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists for that address, we've sent a link to reset your password. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.signsYouOut: Setting a new password signs you out everywhere else.

shared.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, including a letter and a number.

validation.slugMin: Slug must be at least 2 characters.
validation.slugMax: Slug must be at most 48 characters.
validation.slugFormat: Use lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens.
validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.subdomainMin: Subdomain must be at least 3 characters.
validation.subdomainMax: Subdomain must be at most 63 characters.
validation.subdomainFormat: Use lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens (not at the start or end).
validation.subdomainReserved: That subdomain is reserved. Please choose another.
validation.subdomainTaken: That subdomain is already taken. Please choose another.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invitationInvalid: This invitation is no longer valid.
errors.lastOwnerDemote: An organization must keep at least one owner.
errors.lastOwnerRemove: You can't remove the last owner of an organization.
errors.lastOwnerLeave: Transfer ownership before leaving — an org needs at least one owner.

fields.timezoneHint: All class times are shown in this zone.
fields.currencyHint: Cannot be changed once you have transactions.

invitationActions.confirmBody: The invitation link stops working immediately.

members.confirmRemoveBody: They lose access to this organization immediately. Their user account is not deleted.

settings.confirmDeleteBody: This removes access for every member. You can't undo this from the UI.
settings.confirmLeaveBody: You'll lose access to its resources until someone invites you back.

hero.title: Ship your SaaS faster, without the boilerplate
hero.subtitle: Authentication, multi-tenancy, RBAC, and a themed design system — production-ready and free of vendor lock-in.
hero.subtitleSolo: Authentication, billing, and a themed design system — production-ready and free of vendor lock-in.

features.heading: Everything you need to launch
features.subheading: The foundations every SaaS rebuilds — done once, done right.
features.authBody: Email/password with verification, password reset, and rate-limited sign-in.
features.tenancyBody: Personal accounts and organizations with an instant context switcher.
features.soloBody: Every user gets an isolated personal account — no teams to manage.
features.rbacBody: Owner/Admin/Member roles enforced on the backend, cosmetic in the UI.
features.designBody: Token-driven components with light, dark, and system themes.
features.shellBody: A responsive app shell wired to your active tenant out of the box.
features.lockinBody: Every provider sits behind an adapter — swap one file, not your app.

pricing.heading: Simple pricing
pricing.subheading: Every plan below is generated from the billing configuration.

cta.heading: Ready to build?
cta.body: Create an account and start from a solid foundation.

personal.heading: Personal
personal.verifyEmail: Please verify your email address. Check your inbox for the verification link.
personal.signedInAs: Signed in as {email}. Use the switcher above to move between your personal account and organizations.
personal.yourOrgsHint: Each academy is a separate workspace with its own sign-in.

settings.heading: Settings
settings.dangerBody: Deleting an organization removes access for all members.

newOrg.heading: Create an organization
newOrg.body: You'll be added as the owner and can invite teammates next.

audit.heading: Audit trail
audit.description: Who changed what in this organization, and when.
audit.empty: No audit entries match these filters.

storage.title: Files
storage.subtitle: Upload and manage files for this organization.
storage.uploadHint: Images or PDF, up to 10 MB. Private files are reachable only through a short-lived signed link.

errors.type: That file type is not allowed.

verify-email.body: Confirm your email address to finish setting up your account.

payment-failed.body: We couldn't process the {amount} {currency} payment for {orgName}.

subscription-confirmed.body: The {planName} plan is now active for {orgName}.

preferences.heading: Notifications
preferences.subheading: Choose which in-app notifications you receive.

billing.notConfigured: Billing is not configured for this deployment.

validation.occurrencesRequired: A recurring pattern needs a number of occurrences.

groups.title: Group types
groups.subtitle: The offers your academy sells. Editing one never changes sessions already generated.
groups.empty: No group types yet. Create the first one below.

form.name: Name
form.slugHint: Used in the public signup link. Unique within your academy.
form.descriptionHint: Optional. Markdown, shown to parents on the offer page.

errors.generic: Could not save the group type.
errors.slugTaken: That slug is already used by another offer in your academy.
errors.notFound: That group type no longer exists.
errors.locationNotFound: That location does not belong to your academy.

recurrences.title: Patterns
recurrences.subtitle: A group type can run several patterns in parallel — different days, trainers or rooms.

recurrences.skippedAthleteConflict: {count} skipped — a participant would clash with another booking.

errors.trainerConflict: The trainer already has a session that overlaps this one.

credits.title: Credits
credits.subtitle: The academy's settlement currency. Every booking, however it was paid for, spends one credit.
